# Phase 56: Browser Mode Auth Fix - Context

**Gathered:** 2026-03-24

<domain>
## Phase Boundary

Developers can run the frontend in browser mode (npm run dev) and authenticate without needing the Tauri shell. Fix any Tauri-specific API calls that break in browser mode so the full dev loop works in a standard browser.

</domain>
